faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sun Temple, Madkhera?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sun Temple, Madkhera is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sun Temple, Madkhera?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gwalior Airport (168 km) and the nearest railway station is Jhansi Junction (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sun Temple, Madkhera?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sun Temple, Madkhera at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sun Temple, Madkhera?
faq.a: Stays in Sun Temple, Madkhera start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sun Temple, Madkhera?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kari, Tikamgarh.
